creator: jason@aventia.pw
text:
Hi there, Just passing this along, thanks for your support for FreeBSD!

This is on 13.2-RELEASE-p9

:/usr/ports/databases/freetds # make reinstall clean
===>  Deinstalling for freetds
===>   freetds not installed, skipping
===>  Installing for freetds-1.4.10_1,1
===>  Checking if freetds is already installed
===>   Registering installation for freetds-1.4.10_1,1
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/databases/freetds/work/stage/usr/local/include/odbcss.h:No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[2]: stopped in /usr/ports/databases/freetds
*** Error code 1
